title: Heavy Steel
description: This is a small mod with some cool Features.
body:
This is a mod which adds:

 

1-Ingot, hard to craft.

2-Black Steel.

3-Black Orb, the projectile for the heavy steel Scythe.

4-Block, made from 9 heavy steel.

5-Block, expensive but cool.

6-Block, just a normal block.

7-Heavy Steel Pickaxe, expensiv but it gives you 1 xp for every broken block.

8-Heavy Steel Axe, very fast and expensive.

9-Heavy Steel Sword, more damage than the diamond sword.

10-Heavy Steel Bow, high damage and fast at shooting, you'll need heavy steel roots in your inventory as ammunition.

11-Heavy Steel Hammer, right click with the hammer in your hand and a loaded lightning Battery in your inventory, a lightning will strike the player and other mobs near you.

12-Heavy steel Scythe, a very powerful weapon which deals 10 damage and if right clicked it will shoot a black orb which explodes if it hits a entity.

13-Entety, The heavy steel monster hunter. You can craft it, then right click on the floor and it spawns. It kills all monsters and when it dies a lightning will strike.

14-Heavy steel Staff, left click with the staff in your hand and an explosion will happen, you will get full health and slow falling.

15-lightning batterys, loaded/unloaded.

16-fire orb, air orb, water orb. used as fuel for the strong wizard staff.

17-strong wizard staff, a very powerful weapon. rightclick with it in your hand and a gui will pop up. then click one of the 3 spells. the rest is a surprise ;).

18- a strong wizard staff root, used to craft it.

 

Credits:

some Pixel Art is made by Kyrise https://itch.io/profile/kyrise (its under the cc by 4.0 license(https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1))

 

If you like the mod, ill update it
